item.description:
Version 1.0.9

✨ New Features

  • Americano now automatically checks for updates and notifies you when a new version is available.
  • Added a "Check for Updates" option in the app menu to manually see if a newer version is ready.

🔧 Improvements

  • The app icon and menu bar icon have been refreshed with updated graphics for a cleaner look.
  • Updated the app name and internal references to ensure consistent identification across your Mac.
  • Improved the release note display so update descriptions are easier to read.
  • Fine-tuned the build process to deliver a more reliable installation experience.

Version 1.0.8

✨ New Features

  • Added onboarding welcome window for first launch

🐛 Bug Fixes

  • Fixed Low Power Mode handling and observer lifecycle issues
  • Resolved memory safety issues in battery monitoring

Version 1.0.7

🌍 Localization

  • Added complete Chinese (Simplified & Traditional) translations for all UI text
  • Cleaned up stale localization entries

🎨 UI Improvements

  • Fixed settings card layout issues where shorter text (e.g., Chinese) caused cards to collapse
  • Improved Battery settings view with proper scrolling when additional controls are visible
  • Redesigned custom duration dialog with better button placement and SF Symbols
  • More consistent spacing and alignment across all settings panels

🔧 Under the Hood

  • Introduced reusable SettingsCard component for cleaner settings UI code
  • Consolidated design constants into a unified design token system
  • General code cleanup and maintainability improvements

Initial Release🎉🎉

  • Initial release of Americano app.
  • Americano is a macOS app that prevents your Mac from sleeping during tasks like downloads and presentations.
